_comment: Installed by `repo-agent-harness init`. The harness server is fetched by spec below (pin a commit with `init --pin <sha>`); Serena is launched and proxied by the harness itself (serena_* tools). For local development replace the entry with: uv run --project /abs/path/to/astrojones/servers/harness-mcp repo-agent-harness-mcp
